case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RIBEIRO, WELLINGTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,258.27 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RIBEIRO, WELLINGTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
